calendar.matters:
Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-13-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: P. Dias, CSR: Peppina Thompson.
Vaughn E. Spunaugle, Esq., for Petitioner: Marguerite Mackenzie, as Guardian at litem for:
Rose Twaddell and Claire Twaddell, minor Claimants, present.
All parties were sworn and examined.
Onthe basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise of $30.000.00
is approved for each of the minors, Rose Twaddell and Claire Twaddell as follows:
Attorney's Fees $7,001.91
Medical $1,992.33
Costs $10,019.51
A net balance of $19,980.49 in a structured settlement at Ringler Associates.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim signed in open court, see scanned doc. for details of Order.
